# omergulcicek.com — Full site map for LLM agents

> Personal website and blog of Ömer Gülçiçek (Frontend Engineer). Stack: TanStack Start, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, MDX blog pipeline. Locale: Turkish (tr-TR) for site chrome; some blog posts are in English.

## Identity

- Name: Ömer Gülçiçek
- Role: Frontend Engineer
- Site: https://omergulcicek.com
- Email: iletisim@omergulcicek.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/omergulcicek
- X: https://x.com/omergulcicek
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/omergulcicek
- ViraStack: https://virastack.com

## Navigation

| Path | Title | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- |
| / | Home | Hero, featured projects, tech stack strip, recent blog posts, experience summary |
| /blog | Blog | Filterable list of technical and personal articles |
| /blog/{slug} | Article | Individual MDX blog post with tags, series, and prose styling |
| /projects | Projects | Personal apps (Footy, Takvim) and ViraStack packages |
| /about | About | Bio, open-to-work badge, stack grid, GitHub calendar, hobbies |
| /experiences | Experiences | Work history timeline, technology tags, CV download |
| /services | Services | Freelance development and frontend training offerings |
| /bookmarks | Bookmarks | Seven Raindrop categories of curated frontend resources |

## Features

- Command palette search (⌘K / Ctrl+K): pages, projects, bookmarks, blog posts, quick actions
- Dark/light theme with localStorage persistence
- Open to Work badge and bilingual CV modal (TR/EN) on experiences page
- Blog filters via URL state (tags, series, search)

## Content topics (blog)

React, Next.js, TanStack Start, TypeScript, CSS, Tailwind CSS, frontend architecture, state management, React Hook Form, Zod, accessibility, performance, Core Web Vitals, AI-assisted development, ViraStack tooling.

## Machine-readable files

- [llms.txt](https://omergulcicek.com/llms.txt): Concise index
- [sitemap.xml](https://omergulcicek.com/sitemap.xml): Static page URLs (blog posts added when published)
- [robots.txt](https://omergulcicek.com/robots.txt): Crawler rules

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/omergulcicek/omergulcicek.com
